description: CompositionRed top with double neckline made of knitted 100% cotton, long sleeves with two button cuffs in shirting fabric a henley neck with three button placket, inner neckline in shirting fabric has small stand collar with two button placket, flock printed text on back, inner shirting fabric protruding from hem and side vents at hemFitRegularWash careWash at 40 degrees with similar colours inside outPull into shape after washingDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanIron medium; do not iron on printA funky and stylish option from s.oliver. The casual t-shirt jersey fabric contrasts with the checked shirting details to create a unique casual wear option.  Wear this with jeans and casual leather shoes to give a fashion savvy look to your outfit.  Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6" and shoulders 18"
